name: Kaya (Francis Martin)
description: '''Francis Martin Lavergne''' (born August 28, 1968 in [[Montreal]], Quebec) is a Canadian musician and author. He has recorded and performed under the stage names '''Francis Martin''' and, as of 2011, '''Kaya'''; under the latter name and as '''James K. Field''', he has also published several works of [[spirituality|spiritual]] literature.
